_meta.reagents_source: Wowhead Classic (fr.wowhead.com/classic/spell=...), reagents array parsed by engineering-scanner
notes: Reagent IDs and quantities are VERIFIED against Wowhead Classic.
'skill' (required skill level) is NOT yet verified - carried from the old addon DB; skill_verified=false everywhere until a Wowhead pass is done.
TBC/WotLK recipes are intentionally EXCLUDED (they do not exist in Classic Era).
3 vanilla recipes absent from the scrape source carry source='addon-unverified' (reagents not yet Wowhead-checked): Arclight Spanner 6219, Fused Wiring 7191, Goblin Mortar 10577.
Keyed by OUTPUT ITEM ID (matches how the addon looks items up on tooltip hover).
